use_cases: Animated hero text reveal for landing pages and marketing sites
Dynamic heading animation for portfolio and creative agency websites
Interactive text showcase for product feature sections
Engaging typography reveal for multimedia presentations
Reusable animated text component for dashboard headers and branding
ai_summary: A character-by-character flip text reveal animation component with replay functionality. Displays text with a cascading flip effect that animates each character sequentially. Supports light/dark mode themes via CSS variables and includes a clickable replay button to re-trigger the animation. Built with React state management for animation control and styled-jsx for encapsulated styles.
